problem: The number 236! ends in how many zeros when expressed as an integer?

classified_questions.question: What is the objective of finding the number of zeros in the integer expression of 236!?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How can we calculate the number of factors of 5 in 236! using floor division?

classified_questions.label: r
